detail: Member 101: Only 116 days between deliveries (biological minimum = 270 days / 9 months). Multiple deliveries claimed within one gestational period.
Member 101: Delivery claim with ZERO prior antenatal (ANC) visits on record. WHO minimum is 4 ANC visits. Suggests fabricated delivery episode.
